task_completion.description: Open the Mycobacterium tuberculosis H37Rv reference genome in a sequence viewer (e.g., UGENE).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bioinformatics GUI application (like UGENE) is open with the file 'mtb_h37rv.gb' loaded in the project or sequence view.

task_completion.description: Locate the katG gene (Rv1908c) within the reference genome.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The annotations table, sequence view, or search panel shows 'katG' or 'Rv1908c' selected or highlighted.

task_completion.description: Select or configure the extraction of the katG locus including exactly 600 bp upstream and 150 bp downstream.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export Sequence', 'Extract', or selection dialog showing a selected region length of exactly 2973 bp, or coordinates that have been expanded from the original CDS boundaries to include the flanking regions.

task_completion.description: Export the extracted sequence with annotations to the specified GenBank file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file explorer showing the file being saved as 'katG_locus.gb' in the '~/UGENE_Data/tb_resistance_panel/' directory with the GenBank format selected.

task_completion.description: Create a summary text report containing the strand, original coordinates, and total length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (GUI or terminal-based) open showing the file 'extraction_report.txt' containing the strand ('minus', '-', or 'reverse'), coordinates (2153889..2156111), and length (2973).

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical bioinformatics tool (like UGENE) to view and extract the sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI sequence viewer rather than exclusively using terminal commands (like grep, awk, or python scripts) to parse the GenBank file.

integrity.description: The agent used the software's built-in export/extract functionality to generate the GenBank file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with 'Export', 'Save As', or 'Extract' menus in the GUI, rather than just copying the original file or using terminal commands to generate the output.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the text report based on observed data.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor is visible where the agent is typing or pasting the required values, rather than running a pre-written script to generate the report file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target gene: katG (locus tag Rv1908c). Strand: minus (complement). Original CDS coordinates: 2153889..2156111. Expected extracted length: 2973 bp (2223 bp CDS + 600 bp upstream + 150 bp downstream). Expected output files: ~/UGENE_Data/tb_resistance_panel/katG_locus.gb and ~/UGENE_Data/tb_resistance_panel/extraction_report.txt.
